title: Gooey Galette Dates Indian Delight
description: A sweet and unique Indian-inspired dessert featuring gooey galette filling with dates
instructions: Roll out the galette sheet and cut into 1-inch squares.
Heat ghee in a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add dates and cook until caramelized, stirring occasionally.
Add cardamom powder and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in honey (if using) and cook for another minute.
Arrange galette squares on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Spoon the date mixture onto each galette square.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until the galette is golden brown.
Garnish with chopped pistachios and serve warm or at room temperature.
Optional: drizzle with french vanilla for added flavor.
